reviews.review_description: My brother wanted this, he can’t even prepare a swing properly, it just gets hit as he is about to swing at the ball.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, please update.

reviews.review_description: Hopefully some massive improvements are made to this game, right now it is very bad. Putting seems almost impossible, even swinging hard the goes nowhere or with a light swing it shoots off the putter face. Another issue I had was the clubs either extending in length or shortening, not just a club change, they would look like kids clubs at times and at other times they would look exceeding long

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, please update these bugs were fixed in the latest update.

reviews.review_description: this game is so bad DO NOT BUY 1 star

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, please update

reviews.review_description: Putter does not work

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, putting has now been fixed, please update the game!

reviews.review_description: I have played this game now for about a week. It has exceeded my expectations. The feel is great and it is very sensitive and accurate. It helps to purchase the weighted golf club to get the feel.

This game looks good and also can I pls get custom ball a Gtag one pls 



Ps: I used my mum's credit card🤐🤐🤐🤫🤫🤫🧏🧏🧏🧏

if yall want to make this game anywhere near good , take tips from golf+ . the physics are not existent and it makes you nauseous just flying with your golf ball lmfao. the game is not worth a dollar rn instead worth yall paying us a dollar to pay it lmao

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, please update to the latest version. The physics and flying were fixed in latest update.

reviews.review_description: The physics could use some work, along with a few other things, but overall it’s a pretty fun little game. Most the other golf games are at least $20, and this game is only $1 so you might as well buy it! I expect the game to get higher in quality as well as the price, so buy it while it’s cheap! A lot of the other reviews are talking about how you can’t get the right club length, but they recently fixed it in the new update so don’t worry about that.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Many more updates coming very soon!

reviews.review_description: Terrible game absolutely do not get

developer_response.body: Thank you for you review, please update!

reviews.review_description: Is there anyway to reset the length of the club? I always end up accidentally clicking the extend button and i can’t make it normal size again

developer_response.body: This has been fixed, please update! Thanks for you review!

reviews.review_description: This game is horrible dont waste a daller on this poop you can figure where the wholes are and super difficult tk play

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, if you look up the arrow shows you where the hole is with the metres how far away it is from you

reviews.review_description: First issue I ran into was trying to find the flag for the first hole, maybe have a directional arrow where you need to be pointing your club, in the opening screen when it shows you the controls, maybe have something showing which direction you should aim your first shot as I ended up firing my first shot in the wrong direction, also maybe some tweaks to the putter physics, just barely touching it kept overshooting the hole, so far I really enjoyed it once I figured it out, looking forward to more updates.

developer_response.body: Thank you, will be in the new update stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: It would not let me change my club length I don't think this game is very good in my opinion

developer_response.body: This has been fixed, please update! Thanks for you review!

reviews.review_description: I like the part where you can shoot the aliens👍
The distance might need to be tuned and club length needs to be better and choosing where you stand would help

developer_response.body: Thank you, the club length does change when you aim and press A or X depending if left of right handed, to choose where you stand rotate with the analogue

reviews.review_description: I am a new golfer and this game is great!

developer_response.body: We're glad you enjoy it more updates to come!

reviews.review_description: Don't waste the buck. Has potential but God awful currently
